sections.title: Standard dialogue after finishing Icthlarin's Little Helper

lines.speaker: Embalmer
lines.text: Hello again. Do you need something?

lines.speaker: Embalmer
lines.text: Well I'm afraid I can't stop to talk right now. Lots to do.

lines.speaker: Embalmer
lines.text: Hello again. Do you need something?

lines.speaker: Embalmer
lines.text: Well I'm afraid I can't stop to talk right now. Lots to do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have this potion which I thought might help ease your itching.

lines.speaker: Embalmer
lines.text: If I thought that these spots could be cured by some potion, I would have mixed up one for myself before now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry... I was just trying to help.
